name: Fleet Guard Commercial
description: Comprehensive fleet insurance for commercial vehicles including trucks, tempos, and delivery vans with pan-India coverage.

coverageDetails.label: Third-Party
coverageDetails.value: Unlimited liability as per MV Act

coverageDetails.label: PA Cover
coverageDetails.value: ₹15 Lakh for driver & ₹5 Lakh for cleaner

eligibility: Fleet of 5+ vehicles for fleet discount
Goods carrying vehicles registered in India
termsAndConditions: Overloading beyond registered GVW voids claim
Valid permit and fitness certificate required at time of claim
Driver must hold valid commercial license
Policy covers India, Nepal, Bhutan, Maldives
claimProcess: Report accident to police and insurer within 24 hours
Call 1800-209-5858 or use Bajaj Allianz app
Submit FIR, RC, DL, permit copy, and vehicle photos
Surveyor inspection within 48 hours
Settlement within 15 working days

name: TransitSafe Pro
description: Commercial vehicle insurance for individual trucks, taxis, and auto-rickshaws with comprehensive own damage and liability cover.

coverageDetails.label: Third-Party
coverageDetails.value: Unlimited as per Motor Vehicle Act

eligibility: All commercial vehicles registered in India
termsAndConditions: Vehicle must have valid permit at time of claim
Drink-and-drive incidents void all claims
Modifications must be declared
Renewal within 90 days to retain NCB
claimProcess: Register claim at 1800-266-7780 or via app
Submit FIR, photos, RC, DL, and permit
Surveyor visits within 48 hours
Cashless at network garages; reimbursement in 14 days

name: PublicGuard Liability
description: Public liability insurance for businesses protecting against claims from third-party injury or property damage on premises.
eligibility: Hazardous industries may require additional survey
termsAndConditions: Criminal acts and intentional damage excluded
Known liabilities before inception not covered
Nuclear and pollution liability excluded
Claims must be reported within 30 days
claimProcess: Notify insurer immediately upon incident
Submit incident report, witness statements, and photos
Legal team assigned for defense if needed
Settlement per court order or mutual agreement

name: ProShield Indemnity
description: Professional indemnity insurance for doctors, CAs, lawyers, architects, and IT consultants against negligence claims.
eligibility: Licensed professionals (doctors, CAs, lawyers, architects, IT consultants)
termsAndConditions: Dishonest or criminal acts excluded
Known claims/circumstances must be disclosed
Territorial limit: India (worldwide optional)
Run-off cover available on policy cancellation
claimProcess: Notify ICICI Lombard at 1800-266-9725 immediately
Submit claim details, client correspondence, and contract copies
Legal counsel appointed by insurer
Claims assessed and settled per policy terms

name: Marine Cargo Shield
description: Marine cargo insurance covering goods in transit by sea, air, rail, and road against damage, loss, and piracy.
benefits: Covers sea, air, rail, and road transit

premiumInfo.paymentOptions: Per shipment or annual open cover

eligibility: All importers, exporters, and domestic traders
Cargo must be properly packed and declared
Open policy available for frequent shippers
termsAndConditions: Inherent vice and nature of goods excluded
Delay losses not covered
Improper packing voids claim
Insurable interest must exist at time of loss
claimProcess: Report loss to carrier and insurer within 3 days
Contact Oriental Insurance claims department
Submit B/L, invoice, packing list, and survey report
Independent surveyor assesses damage
Claims settled within 30 days of documentation

name: CyberSafe Enterprise
description: Comprehensive cyber insurance for businesses covering data breaches, ransomware attacks, business interruption, and regulatory fines.
benefits: Data breach response and notification costs

coverageDetails.label: Data Breach
coverageDetails.value: Forensics, notification, credit monitoring up to ₹1 Cr

coverageDetails.label: BI Loss
coverageDetails.value: Up to ₹50 Lakh for system downtime

eligibility: IT security assessment may be required
termsAndConditions: Pre-existing vulnerabilities not covered if undisclosed
War and state-sponsored attacks excluded
Minimum security standards must be maintained
Prior acts coverage subject to retroactive date
claimProcess: 24x7 cyber incident hotline
Call HDFC ERGO at 1800-266-0700
Incident response team deployed within 4 hours
Forensics investigation and containment
Claims settled based on actual costs incurred

name: BusinessContinuity Guard
description: Business interruption insurance covering loss of revenue and extra expenses when operations are disrupted by insured perils.
eligibility: All manufacturing, retail, and service businesses
termsAndConditions: Must be paired with standard fire policy
Pandemic/epidemic exclusion applies
Government-ordered shutdowns may be excluded
Declared gross profit must match audited accounts
claimProcess: Notify insurer within 48 hours of disruption
Submit loss of revenue documentation with CA certificate
Loss assessor appointed by insurer
Interim payments available for large claims

name: Fasal Suraksha PMFBY
description: Crop insurance under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) covering crop loss from natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
benefits: Subsidized premium (farmer pays only 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi)
Covers yield loss from all natural calamities

coverageDetails.label: Crop Loss
coverageDetails.value: Up to full sum insured based on threshold yield

premiumInfo.discounts: Government subsidy covers majority of premium

eligibility: Notified crops in notified areas only
Enrollment via bank, CSC, or insurance company
Land ownership or tenant documents required
termsAndConditions: Voluntary for non-loanee, linked to crop loan for loanee farmers
Only notified crops and areas eligible
Yield data from Crop Cutting Experiments determines payout
Claims auto-processed — no individual claim filing needed
claimProcess: Crop loss auto-assessed via satellite data + CCE
Report localized calamity to insurer within 72 hours
Post-harvest loss: report within 72 hours of event
Payout credited directly to farmer's bank account

name: Pashudhan Raksha
description: Livestock insurance covering death of cattle, buffalo, sheep, goat, and poultry due to disease, accident, or natural calamity.
benefits: Covers death from disease and accidents

coverageDetails.label: Death Cover
coverageDetails.value: Up to market value of animal

eligibility: Animals must be ear-tagged and identified
Cattle, buffalo, sheep, goat, pig, poultry eligible
termsAndConditions: 15-day waiting period for disease claims
Pre-existing diseases not covered
Animal must be maintained in healthy condition
Post-mortem required for death claims
claimProcess: Report death to insurer and veterinary doctor within 24 hours
Veterinary post-mortem report required
Submit ear-tag details and policy documents
Payout within 15 days of documentation
Contact United India at 1800-425-2422

name: PMJJBY Life Cover
description: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana — affordable life insurance at ₹436/year providing ₹2 Lakh death cover for any cause.
benefits: ₹2 Lakh life cover for death from any cause
eligibility: Must have a savings bank account
Aadhaar must be linked to bank account
One enrollment per person per bank
termsAndConditions: Suicide covered from day one
45-day waiting period for non-accident death (first year)
Premium auto-debited on 31st May each year
Lapsed if insufficient balance on debit date
claimProcess: Nominee contacts the bank branch
Submit death certificate and claim form
Bank forwards to insurance company
Claim settled within 30 days
Payout to nominee's bank account

name: PMSBY Accident Cover
description: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana — world's cheapest accident insurance at ₹20/year with ₹2 Lakh accidental death cover.
eligibility: Savings bank account with Aadhaar linked
Available at all scheduled commercial banks
termsAndConditions: Only accidental death/disability covered (not natural death)
Self-inflicted injuries excluded
Intoxication-related accidents may be excluded
Auto-renewed annually if balance available
claimProcess: Nominee reports to bank branch
Submit FIR, post-mortem report (for death), disability certificate
Bank processes and forwards to insurer
Settlement within 30 days
Payout to registered nominee

name: GadgetSure 360
description: Comprehensive gadget and mobile phone insurance covering accidental damage, liquid damage, screen cracking, and theft.
eligibility: Smartphones, tablets, laptops up to 1 year old
Must be purchased from authorized dealer
termsAndConditions: Cosmetic damage without functional impact excluded
Manufacturer defects covered under warranty, not insurance
Maximum 2 claims per year
Deductible of 10% or ₹500 whichever is higher
claimProcess: Register claim on Bajaj Allianz app
For theft: file FIR and block IMEI
Submit purchase invoice, IMEI details, and photos
Repair at authorized service center or replacement
Claims settled within 7 working days

name: PawProtect Pet Insurance
description: Pet insurance for dogs and cats covering veterinary treatment, surgery, third-party liability, and theft/straying.

coverageDetails.label: Theft/Straying
coverageDetails.value: Up to purchase price of pet

eligibility: Dogs and cats aged 8 weeks to 8 years
Pet must be microchipped or identifiable
termsAndConditions: Pre-existing conditions excluded
30-day waiting period for illness claims
Breeding-related costs excluded
Elective/cosmetic procedures not covered
claimProcess: Visit a registered veterinarian
Submit treatment receipts and vet report
For theft: file FIR and notify insurer
Claims reviewed within 14 days
Contact TATA AIG at 1800-266-7780

name: CelebrationGuard Event
description: Event and wedding insurance covering cancellation, vendor no-show, weather disruption, and property damage at venues.
eligibility: Policy must be purchased 30+ days before event
termsAndConditions: Change of mind cancellation not covered
Government-ordered restrictions may have limited cover
Pre-arranged events only (not spontaneous gatherings)
Acts of terrorism excluded unless add-on purchased
claimProcess: Notify HDFC ERGO within 48 hours of incident
Submit vendor contracts, payment receipts, and event details
For weather claims: meteorological department report
Claims reviewed within 21 days
